summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of Stock News Popup and MiroFish Swarm Intelligence features. All 5 backend pytest cases PASSED. All 7 frontend Playwright scenarios PASSED. News popup auto-appears on stock select with 10 news items, has working close button, header newspaper icon reopens it. MiroFish strategy renders 5 agent verdicts (Momentum Shark, News Hawk, Contrarian Fox, Risk Owl, Pattern Tiger), consensus banner (BEARISH/68%), entry/SL/targets, and recommendation. Existing SMC, AMDS, GPT strategies still work alongside MiroFish.
passed_tests: GET /api/news/RELIANCE.NS - returns 10 news items with all required fields (title, summary, source, url, published, image)

POST /api/mirofish/analyze with 60 bars - returns full swarm response with 5 agents covering all roles (momentum, news_sentiment, contrarian, risk_mgmt, pattern), valid signal_type, consensus, score, entry/SL/targets
Frontend: Search RELIANCE -> select -> News popup auto-appears with 10 news items
Frontend: News popup close button works
Frontend: Header newspaper icon (data-testid=news-btn) reopens popup
Frontend: MiroFish component visible in STRATEGIES tab
Frontend: RUN SWARM button triggers analysis returning SELL signal, BEARISH consensus 68%, 5 agent cards, entry 1364, SL 1395, targets 1340/1320/1311, recommendation banner
Frontend: SMC and AMDS strategies still present alongside MiroFish
critical_code_review_comments: Problem statement specifies 'Uses GPT via Emergent LLM Key', but backend (server.py L5239) uses chat.with_model('anthropic', 'claude-sonnet-4-5'). Functionally works but does not match requested provider. Confirm with user whether GPT or Claude is desired.
server.py is 5387 lines - far exceeds the recommended 700-line cap. Recommend splitting into modules (e.g., routes/news.py, routes/mirofish.py, services/mirofish_service.py) for maintainability.
MiroFish prompt+LLM call has no timeout configured; a slow upstream response could exceed common ingress timeouts. Consider asyncio.wait_for or chat-side timeout.
News endpoint uses an in-process dict cache (cache_storage). Acceptable for single replica, but won't be consistent across pods - acceptable note only.
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use synthetic OHLCV bars and live yfinance data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_news_mirofish.py covers news endpoint + MiroFish swarm endpoint. Frontend selectors of interest: [data-testid=news-popup-modal], [data-testid=news-popup-close], [data-testid=news-btn], [data-testid=mirofish-run-btn], [data-testid=mirofish-signal], [data-testid=mirofish-consensus], [data-testid=mirofish-agent-{role}]. MiroFish LLM call takes ~10-25s. Use RELIANCE.NS for reliable news data.
